race.comment: EZEIZA (2) finished second two runs back at Kilcoy then improved last time out to score by a neck over 1400m at Gatton. Has the talent to figure prominently. SHE'S BRUTAL (7) ran a better race last start to finish a close second over 1400m at Gatton after missing the placings at the previous appearance. Finds a more suitable contest and can get the job done. THIEF BY NIGHT (3) last start finished 2.25 lengths back in third over 1200m at Esk. Can contest for a place. KOOL BRUCE (5) has been thereabouts at both runs this campaign. Decent effort last start to finish 3 lengths away in fourth over 1200m at Beaudesert a week-and-a-half ago. Should be peaking.
